item.title: Outline (album)
item.description: Outline is the debut album by Gino Soccio, released in 1979 on RFC Records, a Warner Bros. Records disco subsidiary run by Ray Caviano.[2][3][4][5][6]

item.title: BC Ternopil
item.description: BC Ternopil (Ukrainian: БК Тернопіль) is a Ukrainian basketball club based in Ternopil. Founded in 2017, the team made its debut in the Ukrainian Basketball Superleague in 2020.[1]

item.title: Jean Boyer (politician)
item.description: Jean Boyer (French: [ʒɑ̃ bwaje]; 4 January 1937 – 21 July 2025) was a French politician, member of The Centrists.

item.title: Neolamprologus christyi
item.description: Neolamprologus christyi is a species of cichlid endemic to Lake Tanganyika. This species can reach a length of 13.7 centimetres (5.4 in) TL. It can also be found in the aquarium trade.[2]

item.title: Mukalparappu
item.description: Mukalpparappu is a 2023 Indian Malayalam-language drama film directed by Siby Padiyara and produced by J. P. Thavarool.[2][3] The film stars Mamukkoya, Lishoy, Urmila Unni, Aparna Janardhanan, Sunil Surya, Sivadas Mattannur and Unniraj Cheruvathur. It is the last movie Mamukkoya acted before his death.[4]
